name: Toyota Innova Crysta
description: Spacious MPV for family trips and airport runs. Comfortable seating, strong AC, and ample luggage space.

name: Honda City
description: Reliable sedan with smooth CVT, great mileage, and a premium cabin for city and highway drives.

name: Maruti Swift
description: Compact hatch that is easy to park and fun to drive—ideal for solo travelers and short city hops.

name: Hyundai Creta
description: Popular compact SUV with high ground clearance, touchscreen infotainment, and a commanding view of the road.

name: Ford EcoSport
description: Small SUV with a punchy engine and tight footprint—currently booked for the selected season.

name: Mahindra XUV700
description: Feature-packed seven-seater with ADAS options, panoramic sunroof, and serious road presence.

name: Tata Nexon EV
description: Zero tailpipe emissions, instant torque, and lower running costs—perfect for eco-conscious urban renters.

name: BMW 3 Series
description: Executive sedan for business travel—refined ride, sporty handling, and an upscale interior.

name: Maruti Ertiga
description: Affordable three-row MPV with flexible seating—great value for group outings on a budget.

name: Toyota Camry Hybrid
description: Quiet hybrid powertrain, limousine-like rear seat comfort, and excellent fuel economy on long drives.
